title: ShinyDiabete's Enchantement Pack
description: This mod adds a pack of new enchantements to the game
body:
As of now, this mod adds 4 enchantements:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



- Submerged Stealth: It is exclusive to the helmet. Makes you invisible when submerged underwater.

- Coralline Defense: It is exclusive to the chestplate. It has two levels. Level one gives two consumable hearts when submerged underwater. Level two gives four consumable hearts instead. The hearts recharge after leaving the water. Is incompatible with Aqua Vitality. 

- Aqua Vitality: It is exclusive to the chestplate. Heals two hearts every 20 seconds if you are submerged underwater or under the rain. Is incompatible with Coralline Defense.

- Rusty Edge: It is exclusive to iron tools. It has two levels. Level one gives 3 seconds of poison 1 to the entity hit. Level two gives 4 seconds of poison 2 instead.

</details>
